docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $768.09 FILED BY KARNILOWICZ HENRY DBA OCCIDENTAL EXPRESS AS TO DEFENDANT WATTS ROBERT INVSTMENT EXCHANGE SERVICE ROBBINS SPENCER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WATTS ROBERT INVSTMENT EXCHANGE SERVICE ROBBINS SPENCER
